stemHtml: Which of the following summaries lists only directional antennas?

options.a: Dipole antenna, loop antenna, parabolic antenna, slotted planar array antenna.
options.b: Dipole antenna, sense antenna, parabolic antenna, helical antenna.
options.c: Loop antenna, parabolic antenna, slotted planar array antenna.
options.d: Sense antenna, parabolic antenna, slotted planar array antenna, helical antenna.
